data.bio:
If you are looking for old amps, in particular the solid state classics for death metal, desert rock, doom metal etc than check out my captures. I have a decent collection of Peavey, Crate and Marshall Valvestates as well as quite a few less common amps and pedals. 

I've been playing guitar for nearly 40 years and have played in bands, done gigs and concerts. I love guitar gear and have amassed a load of amps, guitars and pedals like you do! 

If you like my captures then please consider giving me a follow on here and to keep updated when new amps, cabs and pedals are uploaded, thanks.

You can donate any amount you wish to fund buying more vintage gear to capture Paypal Me @theswarbs74
